历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 22330 → 22803 → 21971 → 27234 → 29487, showing an overall backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 7500 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 29487; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was about 124–127 from 2021 to 2023, 115 in 2024, and 116 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 125, an increase of about 7.8% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking in 2026 is about 45th, with stable rankings between 42–47 in recent years; Douyin popularity ranking is 54th (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 560,000; reputation evaluation is stable, with no obvious negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps; Veterinary Medicine A+, Animal Science A+, Crop Science A, Aquaculture A, Food Science and Engineering A, a total of 5 disciplines at A- or above, with distinctive agricultural and forestry characteristics.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering continue to have high social popularity; the estimated number of Physics Category candidates in the province in 2026 is about 313,000, a decrease of about 2.4% from 325,000 in 2025, slightly easing competition; Huazhong Agricultural University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, and enrolls about 115–125 Physics Category students in Anhui Province, which is cross-provincial enrollment, with no significant regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward trend of historical rankings, the 2026 enrollment plan expansion of about 7.8%, and the slight decrease in provincial Physics Category candidates, based on the 2025 baseline of 29487, the expansion effect is slightly greater than the candidate reduction effect, the estimated minimum ranking is about 30810, with a range of 30310–31310.
